001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller;
002
003import android.os.Bundle;
004import android.view.LayoutInflater;
005import android.view.View;
006import android.view.ViewGroup;
007import android.widget.EditText;
008import android.widget.Toast;
009import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
010import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
011import androidx.core.view.ViewCompat;
012import androidx.core.view.WindowInsetsCompat;
013import androidx.core.view.WindowInsetsControllerCompat;
014import androidx.fragment.app.DialogFragment;
015import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelProvider;
016import androidx.recyclerview.widget.LinearLayoutManager;
017import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint;
018import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.R;
019import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.databinding.DialogBulkCandlingBinding;
020import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.EggGroup;
021import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.viewmodel.BatchViewModel;
022import java.util.ArrayList;
023import java.util.List;
024import java.util.Map;
025
026/**
027 * Dialog fragment that applies bulk candling results to all egg groups in a batch.
028 *
029 * <p>The user can enter viable egg counts for each group and save the results
030 * in one operation.
031 */
032@AndroidEntryPoint
033public class BulkCandlingDialogFragment extends DialogFragment {
034
035  private DialogBulkCandlingBinding binding;
036  private BatchViewModel batchViewModel;
037  private BulkCandlingGroupAdapter adapter;
038  private long batchId;
039
040  /**
041   * Creates a new dialog instance for the specified batch.
042   *
043   * @param batchId ID of the batch to update.
044   * @return configured dialog fragment instance.
045   */
046  public static BulkCandlingDialogFragment newInstance(long batchId) {
047    BulkCandlingDialogFragment fragment = new BulkCandlingDialogFragment();
048    Bundle args = new Bundle();
049    args.putLong("batchId", batchId);
050    fragment.setArguments(args);
051    return fragment;
052  }
053
054  /**
055   * Inflates the bulk-candling dialog layout.
056   *
057   * @param inflater layout inflater.
058   * @param container optional parent container.
059   * @param savedInstanceState saved instance state, if any.
060   * @return root view for the dialog.
061   */
062  @Nullable
063  @Override
064  public View onCreateView(
065      @NonNull LayoutInflater inflater,
066      @Nullable ViewGroup container,
067      @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState
068  ) {
069    binding = DialogBulkCandlingBinding.inflate(inflater, container, false);
070    return binding.getRoot();
071  }
072
073  /**
074   * Completes initialization of the dialog UI, observers, and click handlers.
075   *
076   * @param view root view returned from {@link #onCreateView}.
077   * @param savedInstanceState saved instance state, if any.
078   */
079  @Override
080  public void onViewCreated(@NonNull View view, @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
081    super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState);
082
083    batchViewModel = new ViewModelProvider(requireActivity()).get(BatchViewModel.class);
084    batchId = requireArguments().getLong("batchId");
085
086    adapter = new BulkCandlingGroupAdapter(this::focusAndShowKeyboard);
087    binding.groupList.setLayoutManager(new LinearLayoutManager(requireContext()));
088    binding.groupList.setAdapter(adapter);
089
090    batchViewModel.getSelectedBatchWithGroups().observe(getViewLifecycleOwner(), batchWithGroups -> {
091      List<EggGroup> groups = (batchWithGroups != null && batchWithGroups.getGroups() != null)
092          ? batchWithGroups.getGroups()
093          : new ArrayList<>();
094      adapter.submitList(groups);
095      binding.emptyMessage.setVisibility(groups.isEmpty() ? View.VISIBLE : View.GONE);
096    });
097
098    binding.cancelButton.setOnClickListener(v -> dismiss());
099
100    binding.saveButton.setOnClickListener(v -> {
101      if (!adapter.validateInputs()) {
102        Toast.makeText(
103            requireContext(),
104            R.string.message_bulk_candling_invalid_input,
105            Toast.LENGTH_SHORT
106        ).show();
107        return;
108      }
109
110      if (!adapter.hasAnyEnteredValue()) {
111        dismiss();
112        return;
113      }
114
115      Map<Long, Integer> viableCountsByGroupId = adapter.collectValidCounts();
116
117      binding.progressBar.setVisibility(View.VISIBLE);
118      binding.saveButton.setEnabled(false);
119      binding.cancelButton.setEnabled(false);
120
121      batchViewModel.applyBulkCandling(viableCountsByGroupId)
122          .whenComplete((result, throwable) -> requireActivity().runOnUiThread(() -> {
123            binding.progressBar.setVisibility(View.GONE);
124            binding.saveButton.setEnabled(true);
125            binding.cancelButton.setEnabled(true);
126
127            if (throwable == null) {
128              Toast.makeText(
129                  requireContext(),
130                  R.string.message_bulk_candling_saved,
131                  Toast.LENGTH_SHORT
132              ).show();
133              dismiss();
134            } else {
135              Toast.makeText(
136                  requireContext(),
137                  R.string.message_bulk_candling_save_failed,
138                  Toast.LENGTH_SHORT
139              ).show();
140            }
141          }));
142    });
143  }
144
145  /**
146   * Adjusts the dialog window size when the dialog becomes visible.
147   */
148  @Override
149  public void onStart() {
150    super.onStart();
151    if (getDialog() != null && getDialog().getWindow() != null) {
152      getDialog().getWindow().setLayout(
153          ViewGroup.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT,
154          ViewGroup.LayoutParams.WRAP_CONTENT
155      );
156    }
157  }
158
159  private void focusAndShowKeyboard(@NonNull EditText editText) {
160    editText.requestFocus();
161    editText.post(() -> {
162      WindowInsetsControllerCompat controller =
163          ViewCompat.getWindowInsetsController(editText);
164      if (controller != null) {
165        controller.show(WindowInsetsCompat.Type.ime());
166      }
167    });
168  }
169
170  /**
171   * Clears the view binding reference when the dialog view is destroyed.
172   */
173  @Override
174  public void onDestroyView() {
175    binding = null;
176    super.onDestroyView();
177  }
178}
